visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Close-up shot of a printed document held by a woman. The camera pans up to show a woman reading the text with a neutral expression. She is wearing an orange uniform similar to the man. The lighting is bright and studio-focused. (2) Sudden cut to a man with short brown hair, also in an orange uniform. He looks shocked, eyes wide, mouth agape, holding the same papers. Large variety text overlays flash on the screen. (3) The man becomes highly animated, waving his hands and pointing to the papers. A screenshot of a Wikipedia page is superimposed on the frame with highlights on specific dates and milestones. (4) The man shouts directly at the camera, pointing aggressively. Various colorful, bold text overlays flash on the screen matching his emphasized words. (5) Final shot shows the man leaning forward over a wooden desk, still shouting and gesturing, while the woman beside him smiles. A smartphone and microphone are visible on the desk.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 或許是幫公司做了太多. [Variety]: 鳩都媽得. (2) [Subtitle]: 頻道訂閱數從數萬. [Variety]: 2020? 2022? 2021?. (3) [Subtitle]: 維基百科. [Variety]: 維基百科^^. (4) [Subtitle]: 2014年達成Facebook百萬粉絲. [Variety]: 百萬訂閱. (5) [Variety]: 很夯. (6) [Variety]: 很紅. (7) [Subtitle]: 不然你會來? [Variety]: 不然你會來?. (8) [Subtitle]: 三高風險? [Variety]: 三高風險. (9) [Variety]: 福利太好. (10) [Variety]: 吃太好. (11) [Variety]: 過太爽.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male main creator, 1 female assistant reading the script
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male with short brown hair, wearing a bright orange uniform with a 'I GOT MY COVID-19 VACCINE' patch on the sleeve.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A dark teal curtain backdrop in a studio setting, with a wooden table in the foreground holding a smartphone and documents.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A calm female voice reads a passage in Mandarin. There is a low-level ambient room tone and the subtle sound of paper rustling. (2) A sharp, loud impact SFX occurs as a male voice shouts 'Chotto matte!' in an exaggerated Japanese accent. The vocal arousal is extremely high. (3) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic synthesizer BGM starts playing. The male voice continues shouting in Mandarin with rapid-fire delivery and frequent pitch fluctuations. (4) The sound of rhythmic clapping is heard as the male voice emphasizes certain words with increased volume and strained vocal texture. Short cartoonish 'ding' SFX punctuate his points. (5) The BGM swells slightly as the male voice delivers a final series of punchlines. A comical 'boing' SFX marks the end of his last sentence before the audio cuts.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A comedic reaction video where the creator debunks a false claim or exaggerated story about his past career and earnings. He uses high-energy delivery and on-screen evidence to ridicule the inaccuracies of the text being read to him.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video employs a classic social media 'reaction' format, characterized by rapid edits, visual gags, and contrasting energy between the 'reader' and the 'reactor'.
